title: Thread Export AAR System Implementation

executive_summary.purpose: Implement thread export and AAR generation system for N5 OS to enable efficient thread closure and continuation across conversations with packed context windows
executive_summary.outcome: Created complete AAR v2.0 system: schema (147 lines), export script (511 lines), command registration, and marked system-upgrade item complete

key_events.description: Decision 1: Use Interactive AAR approach (Option A) combined with API investigation (Option C) - build today rather than just plan
Decision 2: Archive structure in N5/logs/threads/ with descriptive subdirectory names (thread-id-descriptive-title format)
Decision 3: Implement dual-write pattern (JSON source of truth, Markdown generated view) with schema validation
Decision 4: Build MVP today with interactive questions, design for future automatic integration with conversation-end command
Brief API investigation showed no direct conversation access but thread ID can be reliably detected from workspace path; interactive approach works within constraints

primary_objective: Test system on this conversation, integrate with conversation-end for automatic invocation, add progressive documentation option for future conversations

next_steps.action: Test system on this conversation, integrate with conversation-end for automatic invocation, add progressive documentation option for future conversations
